svg.lucide-bug.svg-icon.--bases-embed-border-color:
color-mix(in oklch, #fb464c 25%, hsl(
    203deg clamp(
    0%,
    calc(10% + calc(clamp(-30, 5, 30) * 1.106%)),
    100%
  ) clamp(
    0%,
    calc(8% + calc(clamp(-30, 5, 30) * 0.278%)),
    100%
  )
  ) 50%)

    0%,
    calc(10% + calc(clamp(-30, 5, 30) * 1.106%)),
    100%
  ) clamp(
    0%,
    calc(8% + calc(clamp(-30, 5, 30) * 0.278%)),
    100%
  )
  ) 50%)
